jd_text: HEAD OF IT | Real Estate & Property Development Group | Dubai 📍 Dubai, UAE | Full-Time | On-Site Established developer and real estate group — 200+ employees. Now launching a brokerage. We are a well-established UAE property development and real estate group with 200+ employees across operations. We are now expanding with the launch of a new brokerage arm — and we need a Head of IT to lead the full technology function across the entire group, including the brokerage build-out. This is a group-wide role. You own IT for everything. What you'll own: 🔧 Group IT Infrastructure End-to-end ownership — servers, networks, cloud environments, laptops, mobiles, user onboarding across all entities. You build it right and you keep it running. ⚙️ Bitrix24 & Odoo — Non-Negotiable Full implementation and ownership of both. Bitrix24 across brokerage CRM and operations. Odoo across finance, HR, and back-office for the group. Hands-on experience with both is a hard requirement — no exceptions. 🤖 Automation & AI You spot inefficiency, you eliminate it. Automation-first across all departments and workflows. 🔄 Workflow Architecture — Both Sides You understand the developer workflow (project pipeline, finance, sales, HR) and the brokerage workflow (CRM, portals, leasing, tenancy cycles). You build systems that serve both. 🔐 Security, Backup & Continuity Group-wide data protection, backup infrastructure, and disaster recovery. Non-negotiable. Technical Skills Required: Infrastructure & Networking LAN/WAN, VPN, firewall configuration and management Windows Server, Active Directory, Group Policy Microsoft 365 and/or Google Workspace — full admin and deployment NAS/SAN storage, server rack setup and management Endpoint management: laptops, desktops, mobile devices (MDM solutions) Cloud & Backup Azure and/or AWS — deployment, management, cost optimisation Enterprise backup solutions (Veeam, Acronis or equivalent) Disaster recovery planning and execution Cloud migration experience CRM & ERP Bitrix24 — full implementation, workflow automation, CRM configuration, user training Odoo — module implementation across HR, Finance, Sales, Inventory, and Operations Automation & AI Workflow automation tools (Zapier, Make/Integromat, Power Automate or equivalent) AI tool integration and deployment across business functions API integrations between platforms and third-party systems Security Cybersecurity best practices — firewalls, endpoint protection, access control Data privacy and compliance (UAE data protection regulations) User access management and audit controls Real Estate Tech UAE property portal integrations (Property Finder, Bayut, Dubizzle) RERA/DLD system familiarity (Trakheesi, REST, OQOOD) Understanding of tenancy, leasing, and developer sales workflows You bring: 5+ years in IT, minimum 2 in a head-of or senior leadership role Proven Bitrix24 AND Odoo implementation experience — mandatory UAE real estate experience — developer and/or brokerage side Automation-first mindset Dubai-based or available to relocate immediately Fluent English; Arabic a plus Group infrastructure. Brokerage launch. Built by you. 📩 Apply via LinkedIn or send your CV to [email] #HeadOfIT #ITLeadership #Bitrix24 #Odoo #DubaiJobs #RealEstateTech #PropTech #NowHiring s
